parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "fields": {
    "Status": "Auto-Disqualified",
    "Disqualify Reasons": {{ JSON.stringify($json.disqualify_reasons || '') }},
    "Tide-Pool Score": 0,
    "Summary": {{ JSON.stringify('Auto-disqualified: ' + ($json.disqualify_reasons || '')) }},
    "Stage": {{ JSON.stringify($json.funding_stage || '') }},
    "Total Funding": {{ JSON.stringify($json.total_funding || '') }},
    "Employee Count": {{ $json.employee_count != null ? $json.employee_count : 'null' }},
    "PE Backed": {{ $json.pe_backed === true }},
    "Founded Year": {{ $json.founded_year != null ? $json.founded_year : 'null' }},
    "Customer Persona": "auto-disqualified",
    "Has Active Job Posting": {{ $json.hasActiveJobPosting === true }},
    "Has CX Job Posting": {{ $json.hasCXJobPosting === true }},
    "Matching Job Titles": {{ JSON.stringify($json.matchingJobTitles || '') }},
    "Has Network Connection": {{ $json.hasNetworkConnection === true }},
    "Connection Name": {{ JSON.stringify($json.connectionName || '') }},
    "Connection LinkedIn URL": {{ JSON.stringify($json.connectionLinkedInURL || '') }}
  }
}

parameters.jsCode:
const c = $json;
return {
  json: {
    RECORD_ID: c.RECORD_ID,
    company_name: c.company_name,
    company_url: c.company_url,
    description: c.description,
    source: c.source,
    funding_stage: c.funding_stage,
    total_funding: c.total_funding,
    employee_count: c.employee_count,
    pe_backed: c.pe_backed,
    founded_year: c.founded_year,
    company_age: c.company_age,
    is_aging_flag: c.is_aging_flag,
    // v4.5: Carry through job/network fields
    hasActiveJobPosting: c.hasActiveJobPosting,
    hasCXJobPosting: c.hasCXJobPosting,
    matchingJobTitles: c.matchingJobTitles,
    hasNetworkConnection: c.hasNetworkConnection,
    connectionName: c.connectionName,
    connectionLinkedInURL: c.connectionLinkedInURL,
    // v4.7: Rebuild signal fields
    rebuild_signal: c.rebuild_signal,
    rebuild_leader: c.rebuild_leader,
    rebuild_leader_start: c.rebuild_leader_start,
    headcount_penalty_modifier: c.headcount_penalty_modifier,
    // v4.6: Batch 4 fields
    funding_recency: c.funding_recency,
    years_since_last_round: c.years_since_last_round,
    funding_staleness_modifier: c.funding_staleness_modifier,
    is_cx_tooling_company: c.is_cx_tooling_company,
    cx_tooling_signals: c.cx_tooling_signals,
    suspicious_employee_count: c.suspicious_employee_count,
    employee_count_flag: c.employee_count_flag,
    personaPrompt: 'Company: ' + c.company_name + '. Description: ' + (c.description || 'No description') + '. URL: ' + (c.company_url || 'N/A') + '. Classify as business-user, developer, or mixed. Respond with ONE word only.'
  }
};

    "Founded Year": {{ $json.founded_year != null ? $json.founded_year : 'null' }},
    "Has Active Job Posting": {{ $json.hasActiveJobPosting === true }},
    "Has CX Job Posting": {{ $json.hasCXJobPosting === true }},
    "Matching Job Titles": {{ JSON.stringify($json.matchingJobTitles || '') }},
    "Has Network Connection": {{ $json.hasNetworkConnection === true }},
    "Connection Name": {{ JSON.stringify($json.connectionName || '') }},
    "Connection LinkedIn URL": {{ JSON.stringify($json.connectionLinkedInURL || '') }}
  }
}

parameters.filterByFormula: OR(FIND(LOWER("{{ $('Parse Enrich').item.json.company_name }}"), LOWER({Company Normalized})) > 0, FIND(LOWER("{{ $('Parse Enrich').item.json.company_name }}"), LOWER({Company})) > 0)
